definitions: A curated group of items, often clothing, accessories, or home decor, that share a common theme of soft, muted colors typically associated with pastels.
A specific line of products released by a brand, characterized by its use of pastel hues.
examples: The new Pastel Collection features delicate pinks and blues.
She admired the entire Pastel Collection in the boutique.
Our spring Pastel Collection is now available online.
